visual_description: A man with gray hair, wearing a white shirt and tie, holds a phone displaying Chinese text. In a dimly lit hallway, another man in a dark jacket holds a phone to his ear while standing near others partially obscured by shadows. The scene shows a narrow corridor with Chinese characters on the wall and a faintly visible red decoration.
audio_description: The audio features a male voice speaking in a low pitch with a moderate pace. There are no noticeable prosody or non-speech sounds.
